SEARCH
Package com.nib.commons.io

Class DummyFile

java.lang.Object
com.nib.commons.io.AbstractFile
com.nib.commons.io.DummyFile
public class DummyFile extends AbstractFile
Represents a dummy file.

This implementation of AbstractFile mimics file operations without performing actual I/O. It is useful for testing or when a file definition is required but no data storage is needed (similar to DD DUMMY in JCL).

  • Constructor Details

    • DummyFile

      public DummyFile()
      Constructs a new DummyFile instance.

      Initializes the file descriptor and sets up a default OK response.

  • Method Details

    • readNext

      public FileIOResponse readNext(boolean lock) throws FileIOException, EndOfFileException
      Simulates reading the next record.
      Specified by:
      readNext in class AbstractFile
      Parameters:
      lock - Whether to lock the record (ignored).
      Returns:
      A successful FileIOResponse.
      Throws:
      FileIOException - If an I/O error occurs (never thrown by this implementation).
      EndOfFileException - If the end of the file is reached (never thrown by this implementation).

    • readPrev

      public FileIOResponse readPrev(boolean lock) throws FileIOException, EndOfFileException
      Simulates reading the previous record.
      Specified by:
      readPrev in class AbstractFile
      Parameters:
      lock - Whether to lock the record (ignored).
      Returns:
      A successful FileIOResponse.
      Throws:
      FileIOException - If an I/O error occurs (never thrown by this implementation).
      EndOfFileException - If the beginning of the file is reached (never thrown by this implementation).

    • write

      public FileIOResponse write() throws FileIOException
      Simulates writing a record.
      Specified by:
      write in class AbstractFile
      Returns:
      A successful FileIOResponse.
      Throws:
      FileIOException - If an I/O error occurs (never thrown by this implementation).

    • getLastReadPosition

      public Object getLastReadPosition()
      Retrieves the simulated last read position.
      Specified by:
      getLastReadPosition in class AbstractFile
      Returns:
      The object representing the last read position.
